_README: EDITORIAL chart annotations — curated by WPR, NOT extracted from budget PDFs. Keyed by entity id -> chart/section id -> array of markers. Each: x (the year/label on that chart's x-axis), tag (short on-chart label), note (one sentence shown below the chart), source (optional URL to WPR coverage or the official document; null hides the link). tag/note carry {en,es,hmn}. Hmong is AI-drafted, pending review. VERIFY dates/figures and add source links before relying on these publicly.

note.en: Voters approved a $99.99M referendum in 2022 — the source of most of the district's current debt and a factor in the mill rate.
note.es: Los votantes aprobaron un referéndum de $99.99M en 2022 — el origen de la mayor parte de la deuda actual del distrito y un factor en la tasa por milaje.
note.hmn: Cov pov npav pom zoo ib qho referendum $99.99M xyoo 2022 — qhov chaw ntawm feem ntau ntawm lub koog tsev kawm cov nuj nqis tam sim no thiab ib qho cuam tshuam rau tus nqi se.

note.en: After years of declining enrollment, the school board voted unanimously in January 2025 to close four elementary schools — Hewitt-Texas, Hawthorn Hills, Grant and Lincoln — effective 2025-26.
note.es: Tras años de matrícula en descenso, la junta escolar votó por unanimidad en enero de 2025 cerrar cuatro escuelas primarias — Hewitt-Texas, Hawthorn Hills, Grant y Lincoln — con efecto en 2025-26.
note.hmn: Tom qab ntau xyoo cov tub ntxhais kawm poob, pawg thawj coj tsev kawm pov npav ib suab thaum Lub Ib Hlis 2025 kaw plaub lub tsev kawm theem pib — Hewitt-Texas, Hawthorn Hills, Grant thiab Lincoln — pib siv rau 2025-26.
